title: 8 Pcs Floral Blank Cards with Envelopes and Sealing Sticker, Blank Greeting Cards, Notecards And Envelopes Sets for DIY, Wedding, Birthday, Scrapbooking, Festival (Folded 4.5 × 3.3 Inch)
features: Package Included: You will get 8 styles of blank greeting cards and 8 envelopes and 8 sealing stickers, the card size is 4.5 x 6.69 inches, the envelope size is 4.72×3.54 inches, 8 different styles of cards are enough to meet your preferences and needs

High-quality Materials: The notecards and envelopes are made of high-quality materials with durable and smooth surface, which is not only comfortable to touch and smooth to write, but also easy to keep clean and tidy when writing

Exquisite Patterns: Each note Cards with Envelopes are carefully painted with delicate and soft patterns, presented in a soothing watercolor style, which is not only aesthetically pleasing but also full of artistic atmosphere, making every writing and receiving a wonderful experience

Practical Design: These blank greeting cards with envelopes series is designed for people who are looking for note cards that can adapt to various occasions. Whether it is used to express affectionate blessings or simple messages, these blank cards can perfectly meet the needs of a wide range of application scenarios

Wide Application: Blank cards multipack with envelopes are suitable for a variety of contents, such as note cards, etc., very suitable for making greeting cards as holiday or birthday gifts for relatives and friends
